titleStmt.title: SII 8.402: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 402. (A.R. No. 116 of 1903). ON A SLAB BUILT INTO THE FLOOR AT THE ENTRANCE OF THE FIRST GOPURA IN THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmalaṟ tiruvum poruḷpaṭa
m tāmaraik kuvimulaic ceyappuyat tirup
pa vetanāvil veḷḷiyataṉ tāmarai kātal
mātu kaviṉpeṟat taḷaippa veṇṭirai U
ṭutta maṇṭiṇikiṭakkai tirunilamaṭantai
Āmaiyil kaḷippac camaiyanitiyum tarumamun
taḻaippa Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭi Iṭan
toṟum Eṭuppa karuṅkali kaṉalkeṭa kaṭavuḷ
vetiyar Aruntoḻil veḻvi ceṅkol
vaḷara curutiyum tamiḻum tolvaḷaṅ kulava
porutiṟallāḻi pūtalañ cūḻa Orukai Irucevi
mummata nāṭkoṭṭa(a)yirāvata mutal ceytara
koṟṟatteṇṭicai Āṉai Eruttu meṟi kaṇ
ṭanā ṭemateṉa kayal kaḷikūra kocaḷan tu
ḷuvam kuccaram pocaḷa makatam poppaḷam puṇ
ṭaram Īḻaṅ kaṭāram kevuṭam teliṅkamc co
ṉakam ciṉa mutalāy vitimuṟai taḻai vevve
ṟu vakutta mutunilak kiḻamaiyil muṭipuṉai
ventark korutaṉināyakaṉ niṉṟu Ulaketta ti
rumuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol Occi koṟṟattaraḷa kuḷi
rveṇkuṭai kiḻ kaṟṟaikavari kāvalar vica vi
ṭaikatir navamaṇi virasi ṅhācaṉattu Uṭaṉ
muṭicūṭi Uyarkulat tiruppa maṅkaiyar malarkaraṅ
kuvittu pārttuivar maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu va
ṇaṅkum ceṉṉi cuṭar Iṉamavuli cuṭar maṇimuṭi
cūṭac civanta viṇai ciṟaṭikamala matukaram kamalameṉa A
ṇukum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷi
māmutal matikkulam viḷakkiya komāṟa (komāṟa)paṉma
rāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟkku
yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu nāḷ toḷāyirattu toṇṇūṟ
ṟunāliṉāṟ maturotaiyavaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkiḻ matu
raikkoyil paḷḷiyaṟaikkūṭattup paḷḷippiṭa maḻava
rāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyirukka kiṭcempināṭṭup pavittira
māṇikkapaṭṭiṉa kiḻpāl coṉakaccāmantapaḷḷi
yāṉa piḻārppaḷḷi ḻvārkkum Ivar ceyyati
ruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭikku muḷḷiṭṭu
veṇṭuvaṉavukku pavittiramāṇikkapaṭṭan Entaltem
mpakkacokkan kārāṇmai kāṇiyākavanta
paṭṭaināṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum naṉ
cey puṉcey
ppu Uṭpaṭṭa natta
nikki nikkiuḷḷa yokamum
vatāṉa Accum koyil ḷḷiṭṭa
pili cantivikkirakappeṟu maṟṟu mepperpaṭṭaṉavum
Uṭpaṭa Eṭṭāvati ṉetirā māṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭumu
tal coṉakappaḷḷic canti Iṟaiyiliāka Iṟuppatāka
Iṭappeṟaveṇu meṉṟu Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyar nama
kku coṉṉamaiyil tiṅkaḷ tiruppaṇi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇ
ṭuvaṉavukku paka cekkukkum nām kārāṇmai kāṇiyāṭci
kuṭutta Āmputtūr nāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nilam
nañcey puṉceyyum nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷap
parappum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷic
cantam nikki nikkiuḷḷa nilam Antarāyam viṉiokam taru
vutāṉa Accum kāriyaārāṭci veṭṭipāṭṭam pañcupi
li cantuvikkirakappeṟum taṟiiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭārpā
ṭṭam maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭaṉavum Ivvāṇṭumutal
coṉakappaḷḷiccanti Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṟuppatāka Iṭ
ṭu variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷ(ḷ)variyum nam Olaiyum tarac
coṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ
celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭivittuk
koḷka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār . Ivai tiru
mallināṭṭu ṭaiyāṉ Uyyaniṉ
ṟāṭuvāṉ viracoḻatevaṉāṉa kurukulattaraiya ṉe
ḻuttu . Ivai cevvirukkaināṭṭu cakkarapāṇinallū
raraiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ
kiṭ cempināṭṭup pavittiramāṇikkapaṭṭiṉattu kiḻ
pāl coṉaka
lam vurattukkum pottaṅka
veṇṭuvaṉavukku Ippavittiramāṇikkapaṭṭiṉattu
Irukkum makka
māka kuṭuttapaṭi marutūr nāṅkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa
nilamum karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamum toṭṭa
kuḷamum kuḷapparuppum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattilu
ḷḷa tevatāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki nikkiuḷḷa
Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum taruvatāṉa Ac
cum kāriyaārāṭci veṭṭi pāṭṭamum pañcupili can
tivikkirakappeṟum taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭārppā
ṭṭam maṟṟum Eppeyarpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa Eṭ
ṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭumutal co
ṉakappaḷḷicantiiṟaiyiliyā yiṟuppatākappe
ṟaveṇu meṉṟu Aiyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakku
coṉṉamaiyil taṅkaḷukku civaṉam Uḷḷa
veṇṭuvaṉavukku Ippa kaikku nāṅkaḷ
nāṭṭiṟ kāṇiyāka kuṭutta Immarutūr nāṉke
laik kuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉcey
yum nattamum toṭṭamum kuḷamum kuḷapparuppu
m Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻantevatāṉam paḷḷicanta
m nikki nikkiuḷḷa nilam Antarāyamum viṉiyo
kamum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavārāṭciyum veṭ
ṭipāṭṭamum pañcu
paḷḷiccanta Iṟaiyiliyā yiṟuppatāka
lār Eḻittiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam Olai
ṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi cantirātitta
rvaraik kallilum cempilum
kkoḷka . Ivai Arumpo
kuḷattu Āḻvāṉ Āṇṭa
yapāṇṭiya viḻupparaiya neḻuttu . I
ṇṭanāṭṭu perumaṇalūr Araiyaṉ A
rumperumāḷāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiya teva
n Eḻuttu . Ivai cevavirukkaināṭṭu
nallūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa
ṉ Eḻuttu
ttāl vāṭṭarikkaṭamaiyile cellaThe inscription is worn out, as the slab on which it is engraved is being trodden over. .
Digital edition of SII 8.402 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
